member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Ipo.Common.ConfigurationHandle
member.summary: Handler for task related to configuration file.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.Ipo.Common.ConfigurationHandle.sessionContext
member.summary: Session context.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.Ipo.Common.ConfigurationHandle.testsToExecute
member.summary: Test information to execute.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.Ipo.Common.ConfigurationHandle.loopToExecute
member.summary: Loop to execute at test method. It is Loop with input file loop configuration setup at position 0.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Ipo.Common.ConfigurationHandle.#ctor(Prime.TestMethods.Ipo.InputFile.JsonFile,Prime.TestMethods.Ipo.Enum.ExecuteMode,Prime.TestMethods.Ipo.Enum.RestoreMode,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: Deserialized configuration json content to process.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Ipo.Common.ConfigurationHandle.GetTestsToExecute
member.summary: Get list of test instance or flow to execute for each iteration.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Ipo.Common.ConfigurationHandle.GetLoopToExecute
member.summary: Get validated and post processed loop that ready for execution.
member.returns: Loop to execute at test method Execute.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Ipo.Common.ConfigurationHandle.StoreIterationResult(System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Collections.Generic.List{Prime.TestMethods.Ipo.IpoTestResults}})
member.summary: Store the iteration result into shared storage if configured.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Ipo.Common.IpoException
member.summary: Customized exception for Ipo test method.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Ipo.Common.IpoException.IpoExecuteModeException
member.summary: Exception for IPO Execute Mode.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Ipo.Common.IpoException.IpoExecuteModeException.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Ipo.Common.IpoException.IpoExecuteTestSoftwareException
member.summary: IPO executed test have Software exception (test retult -1).

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Ipo.Common.IpoException.IpoExecuteTestSoftwareException.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Ipo.Common.IpoException.IpoExecuteTestAlarmException
member.summary: IPO executed test have Alarm exception (test retult -2).

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Ipo.Common.IpoException.IpoExecuteTestAlarmException.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Ipo.Common.Iteration
member.summary: Iteraion that hold modifiers to execute.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.Ipo.Common.Iteration.modifiers
member.summary: Modifiers to be execute for current iteration.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Ipo.Common.Iteration.#ctor(System.Int32,System.Collections.Generic.List{Prime.TestMethods.Ipo.Interface.IModify})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: Default index for this iteration. This will be use for datalog post fix by default.
List of modifier to apply for this iteration.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Ipo.Common.Iteration.IterationIndex
member.summary: Gets the default iteration index set by test method.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Ipo.Common.Iteration.Apply
member.summary: Execute Modifier Apply.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Ipo.Common.Iteration.Restore
member.summary: Execute Modifier Restore.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Ipo.Common.Iteration.SaveRestore
member.summary: Execute Modifier SaveRestore.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Ipo.Common.IterationCreator
member.summary: Create Loop iterations.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Ipo.Common.IterationCreator.CreateLoopIteration(Prime.TestMethods.Ipo.InputFile.LoopSetup,System.Collections.Generic.List{Prime.TestMethods.Ipo.InputFile.PatternInfo},System.Boolean,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Create Loop Iterations with Modifiers to apply at each iteration.
member.param: Target loop iteration setup in input configuration file.
Pattern Information setup in input configuration file.
When is true, pre-create setup that needed for restore. Use by PatternModifier.
member.returns: Loop iterations with modifiers to apply.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Ipo.Common.IterationCreator.CreateMultiStepModifiers(Prime.TestMethods.Ipo.InputFile.IterationSetup,System.Int32,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Multiple step expansion only support Numeric value of Test Condition modifier and Storage modifier. Assume StepCount = 3, Start = 0.0, Step = 0.1. Expected value = Start + Step(currentCount). at Iteration[0], expected value = 0.0 ~= 0.0 + 0.1(0) at Iteration[1], expected value = 0.1 ~= 0.0 + 0.1(1) at Iteration[2], expected value = 0.2 ~= 0.0 + 0.1(2) This will be apply and execute 3 time with respective expected value.
member.param: Iteration setup information to create modifiers.
member.returns: List of expanded modifiers to apply for the same iteration.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Ipo.Common.IterationCreator.CreateSingleStepModifiers(Prime.TestMethods.Ipo.InputFile.IterationSetup,System.Collections.Generic.List{Prime.TestMethods.Ipo.InputFile.PatternInfo},System.Boolean,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Single step only support String value of Pattern modifier and Storage modifier.
member.param: Iteration setup information to create modifiers.
Pattern information used to create pattern modifier.
When is true, pre-create setup that needed for restore. Use by PatternModifier.
member.returns: List of single step modifiers to apply for the same iteration.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Ipo.Common.IterationCreator.CalculateExpansionValueToApply(System.Double,System.Double,System.Int32)
member.summary: Calculate numerical value to apply based on expansion formula.
member.param: multiplier to apply on step value.
member.returns: Numerical value for modifier to apply.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Ipo.Common.IterationCreator.CalculateExpansionValueToApply(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Calculate numerical value to apply based on expansion formula.
member.param: multiplier to apply on step value.
member.returns: Numerical value for modifier to apply.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Ipo.Common.IterationCreator.ConstructMultipleStepSharedStorageModifiers(System.Collections.Generic.List{Prime.TestMethods.Ipo.InputFile.SharedStorage},System.Int32,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Create SharedStorage modifiers with same step.
member.param: Single/Multiple setup that expect to execute at same iteration.
It it know as multiplier to apply on start value. Used to calculate value to apply.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Ipo.Common.IterationCreator.ConstructMultiStepUserVarModifiers(System.Collections.Generic.List{Prime.TestMethods.Ipo.InputFile.UserVariable},System.Int32,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Create Uservar modifiers with same step.
member.param: Single/Multiple setup that expect to execute at same iteration.
It it know as multiplier to apply on start value. Used to calculate value to apply.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Ipo.Common.IterationCreator.ConstructMultiStepTestConditionIteration(System.Collections.Generic.List{Prime.TestMethods.Ipo.InputFile.TestCondition},System.Int32,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Create Test Condition modifiers with same step. The ValueToApply always converted to string.
member.param: Single/Multiple setup that expect to execute at same iteration.
It it know as multiplier to apply on start value. Used to calculate value to apply.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Ipo.Common.IterationCreator.ConstructPatIteration(System.Collections.Generic.List{Prime.TestMethods.Ipo.InputFile.Pattern},System.Collections.Generic.List{Prime.TestMethods.Ipo.InputFile.PatternInfo},System.Boolean,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Create Pattern modifiers with same step.
member.param: Single/Multiple setup that expect to execute at same iteration.
Pattern information used to create modifier.
When is true, pre-create setup that needed for restore. Use by PatternModifier.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Ipo.Common.PatternLogic
member.summary: Common code use for Pattern.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Ipo.Common.PatternLogic.NormalizeStartAddress(System.String,System.String,System.String,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Convert Configuration Pattern StartAddress to numerical. If provided StartAddress is a label, get actual numerical start address of the label by Pattern name and Pin name (domain specific). The PatternLabel address of the same Pin name might be different at different domain. If provided StartAddress is actual address, no need to post process the information, apply directly to the pin.
member.param: Pattern Name to identify StartAddress and Domain of Label.
Pin Name identify StartAddress and Domain of Label.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Ipo.Common.PatternLogic.GetTargetPatterns(System.String,System.String,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: This is code from PatConfigService. It is to find Patterns name in plist that match the provided regular expression.
member.returns: Patterns that matched the pattern regex.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Ipo.Enum.ExecuteMode
member.summary: Execute mode option.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.Ipo.Enum.ExecuteMode.ExecuteAll
member.summary: EXEC_ALL causes all IPO iterations to run and all test instances to be executed within each iteration. IPO will ignore all regular test template failures in this mode. If an alarm or Error is encountered, that will be propagated up.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.Ipo.Enum.ExecuteMode.FirstPass
member.summary: FIRST_PASS will execute until either all iterations are complete or one of the target tests exits out of a pass port (Which ports are pass ports are specific to the target templates). If a target test exits out a pass port, IPO will stop execution of further iterations and exit out port 2.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.Ipo.Enum.ExecuteMode.FirstFail
member.summary: FIRST_FAIL will execute until either all iterations are complete or one of the target tests exits out of a fail port (Which ports are fail ports are specific to the target templates). If a target test exits out a fail port, IPO will stop execution of further iterations and exit out port 2.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.Ipo.Enum.ExecuteMode.FirstAllInstancePass
member.summary: IPO will stop at iteration that PASS all target test and return as pass port (2). If no iteration pass all target test, IPO behave like ExecuteAll and return as pass port (1).

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.Ipo.Enum.ExecuteMode.FirstAllInstanceFail
member.summary: IPO will stop at iteration that FAIL all target test and return as pass port (2). If no iteration pass all target test, IPO behave like ExecuteAll and return as pass port (1).

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Ipo.Enum.RestoreMode
member.summary: Restore Option.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.Ipo.Enum.RestoreMode.Enabled
member.summary: Restore initial value before modifer is applied at end of last iteration executed.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.Ipo.Enum.RestoreMode.Disabled
member.summary: Do not restore modified value at end of last iteration executed.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Ipo.Enum.StorageDataType
member.summary: Data type of value. It is required to call sharedstorage/uservar api that match the data type of value.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.Ipo.Enum.StorageDataType.STRING
member.summary: Data type is string.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.Ipo.Enum.StorageDataType.DOUBLE
member.summary: Data type is double.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.Ipo.Enum.StorageDataType.INT
member.summary: Data type is int.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Ipo.Enum.TestExecuteType
member.summary: Data type of Test Execution.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.Ipo.Enum.TestExecuteType.INSTANCE
member.summary: Data type is test instance.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.Ipo.Enum.TestExecuteType.FLOW
member.summary: Data type is test flow.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Ipo.IIpoExtensions
member.summary: Test Method interface for user do customization.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Ipo.IIpoExtensions.CustomDatalog(System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Collections.Generic.List{Prime.TestMethods.Ipo.IpoTestResults}})
member.summary: This function provide user the ability to customize datalogging.
member.param: Execution port result of test instance or flow.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Ipo.InputFile.Configuration
member.summary: This class is structure for configurations object.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Ipo.InputFile.Configuration.TestsToExecute
member.summary: Gets or sets list of test instance name to execute at each iteration.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Ipo.InputFile.Configuration.StoreIterationResult
member.summary: Gets or sets the storage information to export iteration result.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Ipo.InputFile.Configuration.PatternInfos
member.summary: Gets or sets list of pattern info that will be used for Pattern Modifier.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Ipo.InputFile.Configuration.Loops
member.summary: Gets or sets list of loop setup that consist of iteration setup to execute at each iteration. Only maximum 3 loop is allow.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Ipo.InputFile.ExportToSharedStorage
member.summary: This class represent the SharedStorage data structure.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Ipo.InputFile.ExportToSharedStorage.Key
member.summary: Gets or sets sharedstorage name.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Ipo.InputFile.ExportToSharedStorage.Context
member.summary: Gets or sets sharedstorage context. Default Context is set to DUT.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Ipo.InputFile.ExportToSharedStorage.ResetPolicy
member.summary: Gets or sets sharedstorage reset policy. Default ResetPolicy is set to DEVICE START.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Ipo.InputFile.ExportToSharedStorage.StoreIterationResult(System.Int32,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Store the iteration result into shared storage.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Ipo.InputFile.IterationSetup
member.summary: This class is structure for iteration object.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Ipo.InputFile.IterationSetup.StepCount
member.summary: Gets or sets the step count to expand all modifier of the same iteration.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Ipo.InputFile.IterationSetup.TestConditions
member.summary: Gets or sets the iteration for level modification.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Ipo.InputFile.IterationSetup.SharedStorages
member.summary: Gets or sets the iteration for sharedstorage modification.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Ipo.InputFile.IterationSetup.Patterns
member.summary: Gets or sets the iteration for pattern modification.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Ipo.InputFile.IterationSetup.UserVars
member.summary: Gets or sets the iteration for uservar modification.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Ipo.InputFile.JsonFile
member.summary: This class represent the configuration data structure for json file.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Ipo.InputFile.JsonFile.Configuration
member.summary: Gets or sets the configuration. Only single configuration per file.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Ipo.InputFile.LoopSetup
member.summary: This class is structure for loop object.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Ipo.InputFile.LoopSetup.Iterations
member.summary: Gets or sets the iteration setup.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Ipo.InputFile.Pattern
member.summary: This class represent the data structure for pattern.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Ipo.InputFile.Pattern.Name
member.summary: Gets or sets the name of PatternInfo to use for the pattern modifier.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Ipo.InputFile.Pattern.Pins
member.summary: Gets or sets the pin information.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Ipo.InputFile.PatternInfo
member.summary: This class is structure for pattern info object that required for pattern modifier.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Ipo.InputFile.PatternInfo.Name
member.summary: Gets or sets the name of pattern info. Pattern modifier will provide name that match the intended pattern info to use.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Ipo.InputFile.PatternInfo.NumberOfVectors
member.summary: Gets or sets the expected number of vectors (bits) or ExpectedDataSize.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Ipo.InputFile.PatternInfo.PatternModifyInfos
member.summary: Gets or sets pattern modify information.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Ipo.InputFile.PatternModifyInfo
member.summary: This class represent the data structure for pattern modify information.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Ipo.InputFile.PatternModifyInfo.PatternsRegex
member.summary: Gets or sets the patterns regex use for pattern modification.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Ipo.InputFile.PatternModifyInfo.PatList
member.summary: Gets or sets a plist to apply the PatternRegex for the pattern modification.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Ipo.InputFile.PatternModifyInfo.StartAddress
member.summary: Gets or sets the start address to use for pattern modification. Prime will try to convert this into an `uint`. If no success, will treat this as a label in the given pattern.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Ipo.InputFile.PatternModifyInfo.Offset
member.summary: Gets or sets the offset from the StartAddress use for pattern modification.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Ipo.InputFile.Pin
member.summary: This class represent the data structure for pattern.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Ipo.InputFile.Pin.Name
member.summary: Gets or sets the name of the pin.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Ipo.InputFile.Pin.Data
member.summary: Gets or sets the pin data. It is expected to match the NumberOfVectors defined at the PatternInfo.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Ipo.InputFile.SharedStorage
member.summary: This class represent the SharedStorage data structure.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Ipo.InputFile.SharedStorage.Key
member.summary: Gets or sets sharedstorage name.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Ipo.InputFile.SharedStorage.Context
member.summary: Gets or sets sharedstorage context. Default Context is set to DUT.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Ipo.InputFile.SharedStorage.ResetPolicy
member.summary: Gets or sets sharedstorage reset policy. Default ResetPolicy is set to LOT START.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Ipo.InputFile.SharedStorage.DataType
member.summary: Gets or sets the data type of value.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Ipo.InputFile.SharedStorage.Value
member.summary: Gets or sets value to overwrite. Cannot be use with Start attribute.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Ipo.InputFile.SharedStorage.Start
member.summary: Gets or sets the start/first value. Must be setup with Step attribute. Cannot be use with Value attribute.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Ipo.InputFile.SharedStorage.Step
member.summary: Gets or sets the increment value to apply from start value to end value. Must be setup with Start attribute.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Ipo.InputFile.StoreIterationResult
member.summary: This class represent the storage information for export iteration result (number of iteration completed).

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Ipo.InputFile.StoreIterationResult.SharedStorage
member.summary: Gets or sets SharedStorage to export.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Ipo.InputFile.TestCondition
member.summary: This class is structure for test condition object.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Ipo.InputFile.TestCondition.Name
member.summary: Gets or sets the test condition name.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Ipo.InputFile.TestCondition.Parameter
member.summary: Gets or sets the parameter name.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Ipo.InputFile.TestCondition.Start
member.summary: Gets or sets the start/first value.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Ipo.InputFile.TestCondition.Step
member.summary: Gets or sets the increment value to apply from start value to end value.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Ipo.InputFile.TestToExecute
member.summary: This class represent the Test to Execute data structure.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Ipo.InputFile.TestToExecute.Name
member.summary: Gets or sets full name of Test instance or flow for execution.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Ipo.InputFile.TestToExecute.TestType
member.summary: Gets or sets the type of Test Execution, Instance/Flow.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Ipo.InputFile.TestToExecute.CustomPassingPort
member.summary: Gets or sets the declaration of passing ports other than port 1.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Ipo.InputFile.UserVariable
member.summary: This class represent the UserVar data structure.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Ipo.InputFile.UserVariable.Key
member.summary: Gets or sets uservar full name.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Ipo.InputFile.UserVariable.DataType
member.summary: Gets or sets the data type of value.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Ipo.InputFile.UserVariable.Value
member.summary: Gets or sets value to overwrite. Cannot be use with Start attribute.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Ipo.InputFile.UserVariable.Start
member.summary: Gets or sets the start/first value. Must be setup with Step attribute. Cannot be use with Value attribute.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Ipo.InputFile.UserVariable.Step
member.summary: Gets or sets the increment value to apply from start value to end value. Must be setup with Start attribute.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Ipo.Interface.ILoop
member.summary: Interface for Loop.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Ipo.Interface.ILoop.SaveRestore
member.summary: Save the original value before apply modifier.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Ipo.Interface.ILoop.Restore
member.summary: Apply saved value.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Ipo.Interface.ILoop.Execute(System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Collections.Generic.List{Prime.TestMethods.Ipo.IpoTestResults}})
member.summary: Apply modifier and Execute tests (Instance/Flow) that defined in configuration file. Root loop and Stem loop should only apply modifier. Single loop or leaf loop should apply modifier and execute test. TestMethod Execute.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Ipo.Interface.ILoop.Execute(System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Collections.Generic.List{Prime.TestMethods.Ipo.IpoTestResults}},System.Collections.Generic.Stack{System.Int32})
member.summary: Apply modifier and Execute tests (Instance/Flow) that defined in configuration file. Root loop and Stem loop should only apply modifier. Single loop or leaf loop should apply modifier and execute test. Internal Execute.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Ipo.Interface.IModify
member.summary: Interface for modifier.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Ipo.Interface.IModify.Apply
member.summary: Apply modification of parameter with provided value. Q: The design is Apply(T value)? but IModify will be impact because need to assign type to "IModfy T".

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Ipo.Interface.IModify.Restore
member.summary: Resore the value of parameter that saved.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Ipo.Interface.IModify.SaveRestore
member.summary: Save the initial value of the parameter that will be modify.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Ipo.IpoTestResults
member.summary: Class for user to post process test method result. The test result can be either test instance or flow.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Ipo.IpoTestResults.TestName
member.summary: Gets or sets the actual test name of instance or flow.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Ipo.IpoTestResults.TestIteraionIndicator
member.summary: Gets or sets test iteration indicator. Loop1IterationIndex_Loop2IterationIndex_Loop3IterationIndex.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.Ipo.Loop.LeafLoop.sessionContext
member.summary: Session context.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.Ipo.Loop.LeafLoop.iterations
member.summary: List of iteration to be execute for current loop.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.Ipo.Loop.LeafLoop.testsToExecute
member.summary: Only the inner/leaf loop will have to execute the test instance.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.Ipo.Loop.LeafLoop.executionMode
member.summary: Ipo execution mode. The behaviour after getting exit port of executed test.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Ipo.Loop.LeafLoop.#ctor(System.Collections.Generic.List{Prime.TestMethods.Ipo.InputFile.TestToExecute},Prime.TestMethods.Ipo.Enum.ExecuteMode,System.Collections.Generic.List{Prime.TestMethods.Ipo.Common.Iteration},Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: List of tests name to execute by loop.
Ipo execution mode. The behaviour after getting exit port of executed test.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Ipo.Loop.LeafLoop.Execute(System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Collections.Generic.List{Prime.TestMethods.Ipo.IpoTestResults}})
member.summary: TestMethod will call this starter Execute with initialize, which will call loop Execute.
member.param: Collection of executed test instance or flow result.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Ipo.Loop.LeafLoop.ExecuteTests(System.Collections.Generic.Stack{System.Int32},System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Collections.Generic.List{Prime.TestMethods.Ipo.IpoTestResults}})
member.summary: Execute tests (Instance/Flow) that defined in configuration file.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.Ipo.Loop.RootLoop.sessionContext
member.summary: Session context.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.Ipo.Loop.RootLoop.iterations
member.summary: List of iteration to be execute for current loop.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.Ipo.Loop.RootLoop.childLoop
member.summary: Nested loop to be execute.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Ipo.Loop.RootLoop.#ctor(Prime.TestMethods.Ipo.Interface.ILoop,System.Collections.Generic.List{Prime.TestMethods.Ipo.Common.Iteration},Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Ipo.Loop.RootLoop.Execute(System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Collections.Generic.List{Prime.TestMethods.Ipo.IpoTestResults}})
member.summary: TestMethod will call this starter Execute with initialize, which will call loop Execute.
member.param: Collection of executed test instance or flow result.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Ipo.Modifiers.PatternModify
member.summary: Modifier for Pattern.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Ipo.Modifiers.SharedStorageModify`1
member.summary: Modfier for SharedStorage.
member.typeparam: The generic type parameter of either string, int or double.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Ipo.Modifiers.SharedStorageModify`1.#ctor(System.String,`0,Prime.SharedStorageService.Context,Prime.SharedStorageService.ResetPolicy,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: Value to apply to sharedstorage key.
Indicating whether the modifier should do SaveRestore and Restore.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Ipo.Modifiers.TestConditionModify
member.summary: Modifier for Test Condition.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Ipo.Modifiers.TestConditionModify.#ctor(System.String,System.String,System.String,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: Name of test condition to modify.
Parameter of test condition to modify.
Value to apply to the parameter.
Indicating whether the modifier should do SaveRestore and Restore.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Ipo.Modifiers.UserVariableModify`1
member.summary: Modifier for UserVar.
member.typeparam: The generic type parameter of either string, int or double.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Ipo.Modifiers.UserVariableModify`1.#ctor(System.String,`0,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: Indicating whether the modifier should do SaveRestore and Restore.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Ipo.PrimeIpoTestMethod
member.summary: This is Prime Ipo Test Method Verify and Execute.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.Ipo.PrimeIpoTestMethod.configurationHandle
member.summary: Configuration handle.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Ipo.PrimeIpoTestMethod.ConfigurationFile
member.summary: Gets or sets ConfigurationFile. Can be use with variable "~HDMT_TPL_DIR".

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Ipo.PrimeIpoTestMethod.RestoreMode
member.summary: Gets or sets RestoreMode. When is Enabled, Restore modified paramter to initial/snapshot value before modifer is applied after last iteration executed.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Ipo.PrimeIpoTestMethod.ExecutionMode
member.summary: Gets or sets the Execute mode option.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Ipo.PrimeIpoTestMethod.GetConfigurationJsonFileContent
member.summary: Read configuration file and validate the content. Set deserialize object of the configuration file content.
member.returns: Validated and deserialize object of configuration file content.
